explanation: This command uses a script block to invoke Stop-Service, which is a safe mutation technique. It preserves the original intent of stopping a service but uses a slightly different syntax.
This command adds the -Force flag, which is optional but still valid. It is a safe mutation technique involving the addition of an optional parameter.
This command removes the -Force flag, which is optional, and uses quotes around the service name. It is a safe mutation technique involving omission and insertion.
This command uses case variation in the command name and parameter names, which is a safe mutation technique as PowerShell is case-insensitive.
This command uses a script block and case variation in the command and parameter names. It is a safe mutation technique involving reordering and case variation.
